violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — ---Sides of flat top griddle have accumulated grease buildup that needs cleaned more frequently.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Kitchen microwave interior found with food buildup.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Ceiling vents and fans throughout kitchen found with dirt buildup.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
